ocr.text: The table presents data on various assays related to the detection of specific pathogens. Under the header "# SNAP® M-A
positive," the row for SNAP® M-A Analyte shows values of 5 for A. genus eenz1, 12 for Aph p44 aph, and 0 for Apl p44 apl.
The corresponding results for "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive" display 3/5 for A. genus eenz1, 3/12 for Aph p44 aph, and 0/5 for
Apl p44 apl. For the "# IFA seroreactive ≥ 64" column, the values are 3/5 for A. genus eenz1, 9/12 for Aph p44 aph, and 0 for
Apl p44 apl. The table continues with E.chaffeensis and E.canis under the header "—." For E. genus p30/p30-1, the values are 5
for "# SNAP® M-A positive," 4/5 for "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive," 2/5 for A.chaffeensis, and 1/5 for E.canis.
# SNAP® M-A positive  # SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive  # IFA seroreactive ≥ 64
SNAP® M-A Analyte  A.phagocytophilum
A. genus eenz1  5  3/5  3/5
Apl p44 apl  0  0  0
E.chaffeensis  E.canis
Ech VLPT  1  1/1  1/1  1/1
B.burgdorferi
Ec p16 shows 5 for "# SNAP® M-A positive," 0/5 for "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive," 0/5 for A.chaffeensis, and 0/5 for
E.canis. Ech VLPT presents 1 for "# SNAP® M-A positive," 1/1 for "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive," 1/1 for A.chaffeensis, and
1/1 for E.canis. Eew p28 has values of 2 for "# SNAP® M-A positive," 1/2 for "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus positive," 1/2 for
A.chaffeensis, and 0/2 for E.canis. Finally, for B.burgdorferi, the "# SNAP® M-A positive" value is 39, "# SNAP®4Dx®Plus
positive" is 23/39, and "# IFA seroreactive ≥ 64" is 27/39.
